name: Hyperplexed
oneLine: Front-end channel that reverse-engineers eye-catching CSS and JS visual effects from real production websites.
bio: Hyperplexed is a front-end-focused YouTube channel (~656k subs, ~98M views) that picks a striking visual effect from a real site (Apple, Awwwards, indie portfolios) and walks through rebuilding it from scratch with HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS or GSAP. All demo code is published free at hyperplexed.io with no paywall. The host stays anonymous on camera, narrating over a fast-paced screen-share build.
style: Voice-over screen-share build videos around 5-12 minutes, narrating CSS/JS as effects appear in real time.
